title: WIC FARM DIRECT NUTRITION PROGRAM - 211info
text: OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION WIC FARM DIRECT NUTRITION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides vouchers that can be used at participating farm stands and markets to purchase locally grown fresh fruits and vegetables. Vouchers can be used from June 1 to November 30. 800 NE Oregon Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: WIC participants Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for locations of farm stands and farmers markets FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Food Vouchers Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ALERT IMMUNIZATION INFORMATION SYSTEM COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - OREGON SCREENWISE PROGRAM CONSUMER REGULATION - BIRTH CERTIFICATES CONSUMER REGULATION - OREGON VITAL RECORDS CONSUMER REGULATION -
